rules.treatment_combination: If any module outputs ref_urgent_hospital=true, the child must be referred urgently. Pre-referral treatments from all modules are still given.
Treatments from all applicable modules are given together unless contraindicated. A child with pneumonia AND malaria AND diarrhoea receives amoxicillin + AL + ORS + zinc.
The shortest follow-up interval across all active modules determines the return date.
If any danger sign present, refer urgently regardless of other classifications. Give first dose of all applicable treatments before referral.
